text: Any city, any town, or any county not wholly included within a city may by local law establish a traffic safety board. The borough president of any county wholly included within a city may establish a traffic safety board for such county.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 8
#### Article 43. Traffic Safety Boards
##### § 1672 — Traffic safety board

Any city, any town, or any county not wholly included within a city may by local law establish a traffic safety board. The borough president of any county wholly included within a city may establish a traffic safety board for such county.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
